title: BTWPF Resources
description: Sound resources for the BTW Presence Footsteps port
body:
This is the sound resourcepack for [BTWPF](https://modrinth.com/mod/btw-presence-footsteps). It contains integration for all of vanilla's blocks, and most of BTW's blocks. It is not installed like a conventional resource pack; installation instructions are available on the [BTWPF page](https://modrinth.com/mod/btw-presence-footsteps).

## License
This resourcepack is licensed under WTFPLv2, much like the mod it's for. You're free to modify and distribute your own versions of this resourcepack
